name: checkpoint verifier rejects a checkpoint whose signature does not verify against the signing key
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"merkle_root":"abc","signature":"tampered","included_events":1}\n' > compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint-verify.sh" --checkpoint compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json --signing-stub valid 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'signature_invalid' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
